check_note: All uptime checks failed due to sandbox egress restriction. The Anthropic TLS inspection proxy (sandbox-egress-production) intercepts all outbound HTTPS and returns HTTP 403 'Host not in allowlist' for external domains. Sites cannot be confirmed up or down from this environment. SSL expiry dates are unavailable for the same reason — the proxy substitutes its own certificate (observed expiry 2026-06-11 is the proxy cert, not real site certs). No actual downtime is implied.
